filesCreated.purpose: Editor component with FilteredServerSideRender, sidebar controls, Swiper init
Frontend template with WP_Query, Swiper carousel, fade masks, video modal
Frontend Swiper init, fade mask logic, video modal functionality

componentModifications.description: Added video meta fields (videoSource, videoFile, videoId) to testimonial post type registration, following team_member pattern.

Replaced simple blockquote+cite layout with new accent-colored card design: name (h3, text-header-5), program (from taxonomy via get_the_terms), styled italic message (blockquote), and conditional 'Watch the Video' button with video data attributes.
componentModifications.breaking: Yes - existing Archive block using card-testimonial.php will also get the new design. This is intentional since the card is shared.

warnings: Asset size warnings (editor.js 325KiB, screen bundle 356KiB) - pre-existing, not caused by this block

syncStatus.notes: TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender so PHP template is the source of truth for carousel rendering. TSX renders heading area directly; PHP renders the full layout including carousel, cards, fade masks, and video modal.

variations: Default - Automatic mode (9 items, pagination + navigation)
With eyebrow, buttons, and description (6 items)
Minimal - heading only (9 items, default pagination/navigation)
With program filter (Hotel Management, program ID 19)
